creator: omars1234@gmail.com
text:
Can someone verify the fix in (In reply to Hans Petter Selasky from comment #186)

Was the change actually merged for 13.1-Release? I can't determine if it was.
If it was, I still see the same problem after booting from the 13.1 installer.

Same as others, it was totally fine for all releases of FB10 and FB11 (and maybe last FB9), but scrolling console message on all release versions of FB12 and FB13.

At this point I'm contemplating just retiring the hardware (or not using FreeBSD for this workstation). It's unfortunate that existing functionality has remained broken for the 3+ years of this bug being open.
